Incorrect. "Compound" comes from the Latin "com-" (together) and "ponere" (to place). Placed together. No spaces so that they are "gathered to" the same space, one might say. "Plattentektonik" is a (one) compound "word". English examples include "website", "football", "toothbrush", and "notebook".

Title: The Prism of the Jaguar Priest
Style: Photorealistic archaeological photography, Mesoamerican aesthetic, National Geographic style.
Prompt in ALT

images.alt: A photorealistic archaeological photograph of a pristine, multifaceted crystal skull resting on a moss-covered obsidian altar deep within an emerald jungle overgrown with strangling figs. The crystal skull gleams with internal prismatic refractions, surrounded by offerings of jade beads and withered marigold petals, while ancient Mayan glyphs are carved into the weathered stone surface beneath. Dappled sunlight filters through the dense jungle canopy above, creating dramatic high-contrast rays that pierce the humid air and cast vibrant rainbows across the carved glyphs through the crystal's faceted surface. The composition features a low-angle close-up with shallow depth of field, keeping the mystical skull in sharp focus while the lush jungle background blurs softly, visible through the crystal's refractive surfaces in true National Geographic documentary style.

Title: The Peony Slumber
Style: Macro Photography, High-Fantasy Nature
Prompt in ALT

images.alt: A macro photography image of a tiny white kitten curled peacefully inside the soft pink petals of a blooming peony flower, captured in high-fantasy nature style. The kitten's fluffy fur contrasts beautifully with the velvety rose-pink petals that cradle its sleeping form, while a crystal-clear dewdrop rests delicately on its tiny black nose. A bright red ladybug with glossy spots perches on a nearby petal, adding a whimsical touch to the serene composition. The background melts into a dreamy blur of garden greens, while soft morning light filters through overcast skies, creating an ethereal glow that enhances the delicate pastel tones and fragile textures of both fur and flower.

Title: The Attic Aviator
Style: Steampunk Illustration, Storybook Realism
Prompt in ALT

images.alt: A steampunk illustration in storybook realism style featuring a tiny orange tabby kitten with enormous emerald eyes, wearing a miniature brass aviator helmet and round copper goggles, piloting an ingenious flying contraption made from a vintage wooden thread spool with delicate sycamore leaves serving as wings. The brave little aviator grips tiny leather controls with determination, positioned heroically in the center of the makeshift aircraft as it soars through the dusty atmosphere of a sun-drenched Victorian attic. Golden sunbeams pierce through a grimy dormer window, creating dramatic volumetric lighting that illuminates countless dancing dust motes and casts warm, nostalgic shadows across weathered wooden beams and forgotten treasures. The low-angle composition emphasizes the kitten's courage and adventure, with the flying machine positioned off-center following the rule of thirds to convey dynamic upward movement through the luminous, amber-tinted air.

images.alt: A stylized photographic portrait of a beautiful woman in extravagant 1980s couture fashion, captured like a vintage editorial snapshot. The image is rendered in a slightly monochrome palette (desaturated grayscale base), with bold neon highlights in pink, electric blue, and magenta glowing along edges and reflections. The pop art stippling is highly intensified, with dense halftone dot patterns covering the entire image, especially visible in skin tones, shadows, and gradients, creating a strong comic-print texture. She poses with a subtle “shushing” gesture (finger near lips), evoking a mysterious "Our Lips Are Sealed" theme. Strong posterization with sharp tonal separation enhances the graphic look. Dramatic liminal neon rim lighting outlines her silhouette. Her hair is voluminous and teased in authentic 80s style, with statement earrings and satin gloves. Background is a blurred urban night scene with neon bokeh lights, also rendered with heavy stipple grain. High contrast, gritty print texture, retro-futuristic 80s pop-art aesthetic, cinematic framing.
